div.p:
Segments before min_rec_lsn are safe to delete.
Segments between min_rec_lsn and checkpoint may be needed for REDO.
Segments containing first_lsn of active transactions are needed for UNDO.

ul.li: Segment 5 cannot be deleted until T1 commits/aborts

ol.li: No active txn has first_lsn in segment range
Segment is not currently active (being written)
